title: Intense Chewy Ukrainian Pasta Dish
description: A resinous and chewy Ukrainian dish featuring paccheri pasta, perfect for a weeknight dinner, and diabetic-friendly.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the paccheri pasta according to the package instructions.
While the pasta is cooking, heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they are tender.
Stir in the caraway seeds and paprika.
When the pasta is done cooking, immediately submerge it in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
In a small bowl, whisk together the chicken broth and sour cream.
Add the broth and sour cream mixture to the skillet with the mushrooms and stir to combine.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss to coat with the mushroom and cream sauce.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
